entries.name: Arcane Lantern

attacks.name: Elemental Discharge
attacks.text: When the arcane lantern performs this attack, roll a d6 to determine the damage type: 1-2 bolt; 3-4 fire; 5-6 ice.

skills.name: Mana Transfer
skills.text: The arcane lantern may use an action and spend up to 10 Mind Points to choose another creature it can see. That creature recovers an equal amount of Mind Points.

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The lantern is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: Mages often keep these creatures as magical repositories. In a pinch, the lanterns can even help in battle.

entries.name: Clatterclown

attacks.name: Jester Kick
attacks.text: This attack deals 5 extra damage against dazed or shaken targets.

skills.name: Dancing Jester
skills.text: 20 MP · Special · Instantaneous. The clatterclown chooses any number of creatures it can see: each of them suffers shaken.

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The clatterclown is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: A discarded toy jester inhabited by loathsome spirits. Perhaps it is simply looking for someone to play with?

entries.name: Gargoyle

attacks.name: Stone Barrage
attacks.text: Offensive spell. 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. The target suffers 【HR + 15】 earth damage and suffers dazed.

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The gargoyle is immune to poisoned.

skills.name: Flying
skills.text: See page 307 for the detailed effects of this Skill.

entries.text: Despite their weight, gargoyles can levitate using their moderate magical powers. They make for excellent guardians.

entries.name: Magitech Trooper

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The magitech trooper is immune to poisoned.

skills.name: Exposed Core
skills.text: As long as it is in Crisis, the magitech trooper loses Resistance to fire and ice damage and all damage dealt by its Axe Strike becomes bolt.

entries.text: A suit of armor animated by soul energy. Immensely powerful in battle, but its strategies tend to be very predictable.

entries.name: Bronze Golem

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The bronze golem is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: These clockwork automatons are often employed as guardians by aristocrats and merchants. They are imposing but slow.

entries.name: Razorbird

attacks.name: Razor Dive
attacks.text: After performing this attack, the razorbird loses all benefits granted by the Flying Skill until the start of its next turn.

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The razorbird is immune to poisoned.

skills.name: Fast & Furious
skills.text: The razorbird is immune to slow and weak.

skills.name: Flying
skills.text: See page 307 for the detailed effects of this Skill.

entries.text: Often found in the aerial forces of large empires, razorbirds carry a mighty arsenal of magitech weapons.

entries.name: Forest Golem

skills.name: Dispel
skills.text: 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. If the target is affected by one or more spells with a duration of "Scene", instead they are no longer affected by any of those spells.

skills.name: Spore Breath
skills.text: 【MIG + WLP】+2 · 10 MP · One creature · Instantaneous. Offensive spell. The target suffers 【HR + 15】 poison damage and suffers weak.

skills.name: Vine Burst
skills.text: 20 MP · Special · Instantaneous. The golem chooses any number of creatures it can see: each of them suffers shaken.

skills.name: Construct
skills.text: The forest golem is immune to poisoned.

entries.text: Druids and witches often weave together these creatures and order them to guard sacred locations.
